summary: Notification System v215 Testing Complete. All features verified: event-triggered notifications, actionable CTAs, role-based filtering, deep links. Fixed mark-all-read bug (was not setting 'read' field). Backend: 15/16 tests passed (1 skipped). Frontend: All UI components verified.
seed_data_creation: Test notifications seeded for all roles: Customer (4), Admin (1), Sales (2), Vendor (1)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Notification system fully implemented and tested. mark-all-read bug fixed (now sets both is_read and read fields). Vendor login endpoint is /api/partner-auth/login. Vendor orders endpoint is /api/vendor/orders.

customer_notifications.cta_labels: PASS - View Order, Track Delivery, Track Order

admin_notifications.sales_override_notification: PASS - 'Sales Status Override' with 'REVIEW ORDER' CTA
admin_notifications.role_filtering: PASS - Admin sees admin notifications only

customer_orders_table.status_labels: PASS - Shows customer-safe labels: Processing, Confirmed, In Fulfillment, Completed
customer_orders_table.no_raw_statuses: PASS - No raw internal statuses visible

vendor_portal.no_customer_identity: PASS - Table headers: Date, Vendor Order No, Source Type, Base Price, Status, Priority - NO Customer column
vendor_portal.vo_format: PASS - Vendor order numbers in VO- format (e.g., VO-KON-ORD-20260401084225-1)

backend_api_tests.get_notifications: PASS - Returns cta_label, target_url, entity_type, entity_id
backend_api_tests.mark_all_read: PASS - Sets both is_read and read to True
backend_api_tests.role_filtering: PASS - Customer only sees customer notifications

bug_fixed.issue: mark-all-read endpoint was not clearing unread count
bug_fixed.root_cause: Query only checked is_read: False but unread-count checked $or: [{is_read: False}, {read: False}]. Update only set is_read: True but not read: True.
bug_fixed.fix: Updated mark-all-read to use $and query with both conditions and set both is_read and read to True

mocked_apis_list: Resend email service - dry-run mode, logs to console instead of sending emails
